input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.7.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.7.2
            TITLE: the bspd must open the shutdown circuit  ev.7.2.2 when the two of these exist:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.7.2: The BSPD must Open the Shutdown Circuit  EV.7.2.2 when the two of these exist:
EV.7.7.2 The BSPD must Open the Shutdown Circuit  EV.7.2.2 when the two of these exist: 
• Demand for Hard Braking   EV.4.6   
• Motor/Accumulator current is at a level where 5 kW of electrical power in the DC circuit 
is delivered to the Motor(s) at the nominal battery voltage   
The BSPD may delay opening the shutdown circuit up to 0.5 sec to avoid false trips

final_answer: The BSPD must Open the Shutdown Circuit EV.7.2.2 when the two of these exist: • Demand for Hard Braking EV.4.6 • Motor/Accumulator current is at a level where 5 kW of electrical power in the DC circuit is delivered to the Motor(s) at the nominal battery voltage The BSPD may delay opening the shutdown circuit up to 0.5 sec to avoid false trips
